# [PE_164](../PE_164.java)

Simple recursion with pruning and memoization. 

Some results in the form  
`<digits> <time in ms>: <number count>`

<details>
<summary>Results up to 25 digits</summary>

```
2  0 ms: 45
3  0 ms: 165
4  0 ms: 990
5  0 ms: 5445
6  0 ms: 27588
7  1 ms: 146586
8  0 ms: 783057
9  0 ms: 4129851
10 0 ms: 21838806
11 0 ms: 115769366
12 0 ms: 612836369
13 0 ms: 3243500668
14 0 ms: 17173865103
15 1 ms: 90925480442
16 0 ms: 481357047859
17 0 ms: 2548412766628
18 0 ms: 13491956416089
19 0 ms: 71428894098517
20 1 ms: 378158756814587
21 0 ms: 2002053098399745
22 0 ms: 10599279127251935
23 0 ms: 56114742906845441
24 1 ms: 297083021133747666
25 0 ms: 1572818628532926078
```
</details>

Using BigInteger we can increase that to:
<details>
<summary markdown="1">BigInteger results up to 12800 digits</summary>

```
100   2 ms: 3032062719793139357699425713765796768554429864635812209711991016452877110
200   3 ms: 7274741815032136153607361589629003781676936908708155882869648248034504754450517494559288110758226754285455613887881277039132607298397728420624462
400   4 ms: 41877080070119556396715375316395411596858799836325374526192462302593518334447737440813025794179125448962990895318081493095687267687289466422519733110954964595468114085912224458783073018291069084703463910180267626569493127220988419653684339813765802283245750223500936318569132915211203419223
800   10 ms: 
1600  38 ms: 
3200  81 ms: 
6400  292 ms: 
12800 994 ms: 
```
</details>
